prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time financial market data beyond my last training update and cannot predict future stock prices. These intervals are not derived from actual financial models, historical volatility analysis, or fundamental research, and should not be interpreted as financial advice or an accurate forecast.
